verify.confirmIntro: You’re one step away. Press the button below to confirm your TownGate newsletter email. (This avoids automated link checks from invalidating your confirmation.)
verify.ok: Your subscription has been confirmed successfully.
verify.invalid: This confirmation link is invalid or was already used. Please subscribe again from the website.
verify.expired: This confirmation link has expired. Please subscribe again.
verify.server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again later.
